pass_conditions.condition: report includes at least three validation iterations
each iteration exercises the local L1 prototype through a live localhost HTTP surface
pass_conditions.observed: 3/3 iterations returned HTTP 200 with visible output

pass_conditions.condition: local evidence integrity failures are zero
green reliability artifacts still pass recorded thresholds
Gate A-D state is still pass
validation records no forbidden external or production side effect

fail_conditions_checked.condition: Phase 4 validates only by static file inspection or unit tests
validation report is used to authorize yellow auto-approval, external repo mutation, or production operation

authorized_next: create the next narrow runtime-slice proposal
start provider-adapter-kernel only if it remains local/API-compatible and preserves raw+parsed provider evidence
not_authorized: paid provider calls without an explicit cost/provider activation decision
recommendation: Gate E passes for repo-local operational validation. The next useful implementation slice is a local provider-adapter kernel with raw output snapshots, parser schema versioning, drift detection, and stub-backed tests.
